{{CargoRelic
|name=Royal Doll
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=08-27
|source=Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.82%)
|description=On Aug 27, 1899, inspired by Sissi, the very first royal doll was created.

Sissi was known for her beauty and was the concubine of Osman. The king held this doll to remember Sissi who had just passed away. It has long golden hair, a high forehead, curved eyebrows, and fair skin. Inside this dress was the most popular corset in the 19th century, which is elegant and beautiful.
|fame=28
|art=28
|fth=25
|civ=45
|tech=28
|ss1=Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +1
|ss2=Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +2
|ss3=Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss4=Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +5
|ss7=Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +5<br>Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +3 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Genesim skill I.png|50px]] Place in Gene Sim Device: This Relic's CIV +5
}}

[[Category:Angel Minion HARD Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Simulation Compass Boost]]
[[Category:CIV Boost]]
[[Category:Offering Reward Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Research Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Imp Boost]]
